note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Zoë and Mateo discuss their plan to infiltrate Dr. Baeza's lab. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo briefs Zoë on the layout of Dr. Baeza's lab and security measures. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Zoë and Mateo scope out the lab, searching for an entry point. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Zoë navigates the cramped ventilation system to reach Dr. Baeza's office. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Zoë discovers evidence of Dr. Baeza's experiments and a mysterious data storage device. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Zoë narrowly avoids detection by lab security personnel. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Zoë and Mateo reunite, discussing their next move. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Zoë reflects on her situation and the implications of Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Mateo reveals a cryptic message from an unknown sender, hinting at a larger conspiracy. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Zoë tries to process the events of the previous day and her growing unease. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Chief Ortega questions Mateo about his involvement with Zoë and Dr. Baeza. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Zoë and Mateo realize they must act quickly to uncover the truth before Chief Ortega closes in. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Marina provides Zoë with information about Dr. Baeza's research and a possible lead on her location. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Zoë discovers Javi's involvement in Dr. Baeza's experiments and the true nature of his 'art'. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 15: Zoë infiltrates the lab, searching for Dr. Baeza and the truth about her research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 16: Zoë navigates the lab, avoiding security personnel and confronting the consequences of her actions. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 17: Zoë uncovers a shocking truth about Dr. Baeza's research and its connection to her own past. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Proof of Yesterday") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
